---
title: Slides
---

## Course Slides

Click on a topic to download the PDF slide deck.

| # | Module | |
|--:|--------|:-:|
| 0 | [Course Introduction](slides/00-intro.pdf) | [{{< fa file-pdf >}}](slides/00-intro.pdf) |
| 1 | [AI Fundamentals](slides/m1-ai-financial-tool.pdf) | [{{< fa file-pdf >}}](slides/m1-ai-financial-tool.pdf) |
| 2 | [Getting Started with Claude Code](slides/m2-claude.pdf) | [{{< fa file-pdf >}}](slides/m2-claude.pdf) |
| 3a | [Portfolio Optimization](slides/m3-portfolio-optimization.pdf) | [{{< fa file-pdf >}}](slides/m3-portfolio-optimization.pdf) |
| 3b | [Company Valuation](slides/m3-dcf-analysis.pdf) | [{{< fa file-pdf >}}](slides/m3-dcf-analysis.pdf) |
| 4 | [Connecting AI to Data and Tools](slides/m4-data-tools.pdf) | [{{< fa file-pdf >}}](slides/m4-data-tools.pdf) |
| 5 | [Automating Financial Workflows](slides/m5-automating-workflows.pdf) | [{{< fa file-pdf >}}](slides/m5-automating-workflows.pdf) |
| 6 | [Working with Financial Documents](slides/m6-financial-documents.pdf) | [{{< fa file-pdf >}}](slides/m6-financial-documents.pdf) |
| 7 | [Building Financial AI Applications](slides/m7-financial-applications.pdf) | [{{< fa file-pdf >}}](slides/m7-financial-applications.pdf) |
| 8 | [Verification and Governance](slides/m8-verification.pdf) | [{{< fa file-pdf >}}](slides/m8-verification.pdf) |
| 9 | [AI in Trading and Markets](slides/m9-trading-markets.pdf) | [{{< fa file-pdf >}}](slides/m9-trading-markets.pdf) |
